docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOWALEWSKI, DAMIAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSVIRTUAL TECHNOLOGIES INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
